scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run build --prefix apps/web && npm test --prefix apps/api && npm run lint --prefix apps/web
scripts.prebuild: npm ci --prefix apps/api --include=dev && npm ci --prefix apps/widget --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/widget && npm run build --prefix apps/api
scripts.dev: cd apps/api && npx tsx watch src/server.ts
